title: Wave 4 Mini App rich UX
acceptanceCriteria: Mini App launch validates Telegram initData and issues short-lived app sessions
API exposes action-first dashboard, sessions, approvals, hosts, reports, diff, verify, and bundle projections
Mini App renders mobile-first next-action screens with draft recovery and deep-link continuity
Dev CORS uses explicit allowlist without production wildcard
Mini App UX documentation includes required principles, IA, microcopy, and recovery examples
